cover.subtitle:
효종은 장자인가 차자인가,
상복으로 갈린 권력.
cover.imagePrompt: Joseon folk minhwa + genre-painting tones. Hanji beige, ink-black, crimson, navy. Scene: a solemn royal mourning hall with TWO groups of yangban officials in plain white mourning robes (sangbok) standing on opposite sides of a covered low altar, gesturing toward a folded white hemp robe at the center. A queen-mother figure (Jouedaebi) sits veiled on a low platform behind. Composition: ritualistic, tense, monochrome with crimson seal accents. Color: dominant white-beige hanji + ink-black + small crimson seal accents. Style: flat illustration, hand-drawn lines, simple shading, paper texture background. NO TEXT, NO LETTERS, NO NUMBERS, NO CAPTIONS, NO LOGOS anywhere in image. No realistic photo quality, no anime, no modern anachronism.

timeline.text: 효종 사망, 자의대비 상복 논쟁 시작.
남인 기년복 승리, 서인 대거 축출.

outro.tip_headline:
"기해는 서인, 갑인은 남인"
승자를 묶을 것.
outro.tip_body: 심화에서는 1차 기해예송(1659)에서 서인 기년복이, 2차 갑인예송(1674)에서 남인 기년복이 채택된 점을 구분해야 한다. 본질은 효종의 왕통(장자/차자) 해석.
outro.imagePrompt: Minimal hanji-beige background. CENTER: a stylized folded white mourning robe (sangbok) on a low stand, with two small ink calendar marks on either side suggesting different mourning durations. Cream #F2EDE3 base + ink-black + small crimson #B45309 seal accent. Flat illustration, hand-drawn lines, simple shading, paper texture background. NO TEXT, NO LETTERS, NO NUMBERS, NO CAPTIONS, NO LOGOS anywhere in image. No realistic photo quality, no anime, no modern anachronism.
